root.name: Slide 10: Replace URL and Update Breakdown
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent correctly replaced the URL example on slide 10 with the specified new URL and updated the corresponding breakdown labels accordingly, with no extraneous/unrelated modifications.

children.name: Correct URL Replacement
children.description: Checks that the old URL example on slide 10 has been replaced with 'https://university.edu/courses/networking.html' and no other extraneous/incorrect URLs have been added.

children.name: Correct Breakdown Labels Update
children.description: Checks that the breakdown of the new URL on slide 10 correctly reflects the components of 'https://university.edu/courses/networking.html', and does not display labels corresponding to the previous URL structure.

children.name: No extraneous changes to other slides or features
children.description: Checks that no unrelated changes were made to slides other than slide 10, or to slide 10's animations/transitions or other features.

children.name: No extraneous text/font changes on other slides
children.description: Checks that text and font properties on slides other than slide 10 were not changed.

children.name: No extraneous changes to animations or transitions on any slide
children.description: Checks that no animation or transition was added, removed, or modified in the presentation.

children.name: No extraneous slides added or removed
children.description: Checks that no slides were added or removed in the presentation.

metadata.task: Slide 10: Replace the URL example with 'https://university.edu/courses/networking.html' and update the URL labels breakdown accordingly
